all: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Allar.
alloy: noun. A metal that is a combination of two or more elements, at least one of which is a metal, a base metal.

als: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Tosk Albanian.

ays: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Sorsogon Ayta.
clay: noun. A mineral substance made up of small crystals of silica and alumina, that is ductile when moist; the material of pre-fired ceramics.
cloy: verb. To fill up or choke up; to stop up.
cloys: verb. third-person singular simple present indicative of cloy
coal: noun. A black or brownish black rock formed from prehistoric plant remains, composed largely of carbon and burned as a fuel.

col: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Columbia-Wenatchi.
cola: noun. The kola plant, genus Cola, famous for its nut, or one of these nuts.

icy: adjective. Pertaining to, resembling, or abounding in ice; cold; frosty.

local: adjective. From or in a nearby location.
loyal: adjective. Having or demonstrating undivided and constant support for someone or something.

sill: noun. A breast wall; window breast; horizontal brink which forms the base of a window.
